LanguageData.WM_CoordinateWorks.label: coordinate works
LanguageData.WM_CoordinateWorks.description: This person is coordinating construction and logistics, boosting efficiency for everyone nearby by 75%. When present in a caravan, road building is also accelerated by 75%.
LanguageData.WM_CoordinateWorksBuff.label: coordinate works
LanguageData.WM_CoordinateWorksBuff.description: This person's construction speed is boosted thanks to being near a surveyor using coordinate works.
LanguageData.WM_GroundbreakingBuff.label: groundbreaking inspiration
LanguageData.WM_GroundbreakingBuff.description: Inspired by the groundbreaking ceremony, this person's construction speed is increased.
